title: Knockin' on Heaven's Door
why_this_song: Knockin' on Heaven's Door by Bob Dylan (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Knock, knock, knockin' on heaven's door"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I feel I'm knockin' on heaven's door"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I feel I'm knockin' on heaven's door"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I feel I'm knockin' on heaven's door"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Mama, take this badge off of me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "knock" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "knock" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Mama, take this badge off of me
Knock, knock, knockin' on heaven's door
That long black cloud is comin' down

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bob Dylan one question about "Knockin' on Heaven's Door", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bob Dylan sobre "Knockin' on Heaven's Door", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Knockin' on Heaven's Door" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Knockin' on Heaven's Door" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Knockin' on Heaven's Door" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Knockin' on Heaven's Door" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
